case_title: REED ESPANOLA P VS MERAY RICH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $375.00 FILED BY REED ESPANOLA P AS TO DEFENDANT MERAY RICH DULA DONIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
